arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are targeting a move for a winger who has a habit of winning trophies. The Premier League giants are looking to strengthen their squad in the summer transfer window and they have identified their transfer targets already. arts.ttl: Everton vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Everton host Arsenal on Saturday lunchtime in what will be the final time the two sides meet at Goodison Park. In midweek the Toffees narrowly lost the Merseyside derby to fierce rivals Liverpool. Diogo Jota scored the decisive goal at Anfield to end Everton’s six-game unbeaten streak. Everyone got through the game unscathed with key […] The post Everton vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Everton vs Arsenal - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League title chase continues on Saturday when they take on Everton at Goodison Park. Discovery Plus will also stream the match from Goodison Park, which is available to paid subscribers and TNT Sports customers via their mobile and TB app.

arts.ttl: I was sad to leave Arsenal but now I'm tearing it up in new division after signing contract
arts.sum: After spending time at Melbourne City and Newcastle Jets, Harlow-born Jenkinson moved back to the EFL earlier this season as he joined newly-promoted Bromley. In fact, Bromley have only lost ONE league game when Jenkinson has played - and that came in a 1-0 defeat to high-flying Bradford City in February.

arts.ttl: Arsenal believe ‘absolutely sensational’ Premier League star is heading to Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal feel one of their top transfer targets will join Liverpool if he leaves his current club this summer. The Gunners are ready to make additions to their squad after this season with Mikel Arteta’s side once again likely to fail in their quest to win the Premier League title. arts.ttl: Arsenal hold talks for huge Hugo Ekitike transfer to beat Man United and Liverpool to deal
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly one of three teams who have held talks over signing Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike in the summer transfer window. In an attempt to prevent being caught short for a striker next season, it is understood that Arsenal will be making a centre-forward a priority in the summer.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available vs Everton as five ruled out after Gabriel injury blow
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side are 12 points behind Liverpool in the Premier League table going into their trip to Merseyside. Arsenal will be without some key players when they face Everton in the Premier League this weekend.
